unit: Jon Snow / the Wall enrichment pass 1
post_verify_modifications: RETIRE existing `pink-letter-delivered TRIGGERS jon-is-stabbed-repeatedly` (its quote 'is there any man here who will come stand with me?' is the Shieldhall speech — superseded by the-shieldhall-speech TRIGGERS edge)
RETIRE existing `mance-rayder VICTIM_IN mance-rayder-brought-to-execution` (factually false post-reveal: Rattleshirt/lord-of-bones burned, Mance lived) — replaced by lord-of-bones VICTIM_IN
node_alias_hygiene: remove 'Mance Rayder' alias from graph/nodes/characters/lord-of-bones.node.md (resolver collision; the DISGUISED_AS edge now carries that fact)

edges.quote: I think we had best change the plan
edges.note: letter is precondition; Jon deliberates then chooses to call the assembly. ENABLES not TRIGGERS.

edges.quote: Yarwyck and Marsh were slipping out
edges.note: the conspirators' exit at the speech is the proximate spark; replaces the collapsed pink-letter->stabbing direct edge.

edges.quote: I want all the leading men in the Shieldhall
edges.note: Jon calls + gives the speech.

edges.quote: a sound went through the hall, like wasps stirring in a nest
edges.note: venue.

edges.quote: The wildlings outnumbered the crows by five to one
edges.note: the wildling-majority crowd that roars to follow Jon is the product of the free-folk decree; precondition of the scene's success.

edges.quote: At Hardhome, with six ships
edges.note: the letter's dateline.

edges.quote: From Talon, by hand of Maester Harmune
edges.note: Cotter Pyke commands the relief fleet and authors the letter (his angry mark below).

edges.quote: now my war begins
edges.note: the revelation drives Jon's resolve; routes agency through Jon.

edges.quote: make plans for the relief of Hardhome
edges.note: Hardhome is the stated reason for the assembly; converges with pink-letter ENABLES into a 2-cause hub.

edges.quote: Yarwyck and Marsh were slipping out
edges.note: exits with Marsh's men at the decision moment; not shown wielding a knife. SUSPECTED_OF = unproven agency.

edges.quote: Bowen had Wick Whittlestick, Left Hand Lew, and Alf of Runnymudd beside him
edges.note: seated in Bowen's inner cluster; the third unnamed dagger. THIN — fresh-verify likely-trim candidate.

edges.quote: Bowen had Wick Whittlestick, Left Hand Lew, and Alf of Runnymudd beside him
edges.note: same as C2. THIN — fresh-verify likely-trim candidate.

edges.quote: Yarwyck and Marsh were slipping out
edges.note: act in concert + joint exit; passive-agreement-vs-active-conspiracy ambiguous, fresh-verify.

edges.quote: their disapproval went bone deep
edges.note: Yarwyck's documented free-folk grievances (Borroq/Stonedoor) mirror the existing Bowen grievance edge.

edges.quote: She burned the Lord of Bones
edges.note: Mance (alive) walks as Rattleshirt/Lord of Bones. impersonator -> impersonated.

edges.quote: She burned the Lord of Bones
edges.note: the burned Rattleshirt was glamoured to look like Mance; resolves the alias collision on lord-of-bones.

edges.quote: touched the ruby at her neck and spoke a word
edges.note: Melisandre casts/dispels the glamour at the burning.

edges.quote: She burned the Lord of Bones
edges.note: the actual man burned (replaces the false mance-rayder VICTIM_IN).

edges.quote: the ruby seemed to pulse
edges.note: coercive control via the ruby fetter; distinct from the glamour casting.

edges.quote: you sent him to Winterfell to steal my bride
edges.note: the glamour-survival lets Mance go to Winterfell, which is what the Pink Letter taunts about. Lens D's highest-value structural fix.

edges.quote: smashed in seven days of battle
edges.note: the stall is the precondition that makes Ramsay's victory-claim plausible/actionable; lights a dead-end node (stall had 0 outgoing). NOT wired to any unwritten battle node.

edges.quote: put his dagger in your king's back
edges.note: Alys is the intelligence vector who warns Jon that Arnolf's allegiance is a Bolton trap.

edges.quote: a dozen ice cells
edges.note: Cregan jailed at Castle Black after pursuing Alys.

edges.quote: Tormund Giantsbane had come at last
edges.note: Tormund negotiated + led the free-folk passage Jon authorized.

edges.quote: she shall wed my good and leal knight, Ser Patrek
edges.note: Selyse betroths Patrek to Val; his swagger triggers the Wun Wun confrontation during the stabbing scene.

edges.quote: Ghost is more alive than I am
edges.note: the defining warg bond; first-use WARGS_INTO.

edges.quote: could not seem to get the sword free of its scabbard
edges.note: the sword Jon cannot draw as he is stabbed; symbolic.
